content:
Uranus in Taurus: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Uranus in Taurus blends the archetypal drive of Uranus (where you seek change, break rules, and awaken) with the Earth, fixed nature of Taurus.

  • Planet: Uranus — change, innovation, rebellion, awakening, freedom
  • Sign: Taurus (Earth/Fixed) — stability, sensuality, patience, values, determination

Eastern Perspective

Parallel Eastern reference (not historical correspondence): 七曜 (Seven Luminaries: Sun/Moon + Mars=火/水/木/金/土 五星 mapped to 火曜/水曜/木曜/金曜/土曜). Use as parallel frame only, not as Western-Eastern historical equivalence.
